Parents consider you a trusted source of vaccine information. Here are tips for how to respond.

Reasons to Follow the Schedule

Explaining How Vaccines Work 
Learn why and how vaccines help the body fight infection and strengthen natural defenses.

Your child needs vaccines as they grow! 
Guide for parents and caregivers to ensure their child is up-to-date on recommended childhood vaccines. 
Aug. 13, 2024 
Vaccine Resources 
View, download, or print communication resources to learn about vaccination and specific vaccines. 
Aug. 14, 2024 
Childhood Vaccines 
Vaccines can help protect babies and children from serious, even deadly, diseases. It’s important to stay up to date on recommended vaccines.
